title: varthemia sericea
intro: Varthemia sericea, also known as fleabane or silver ragwort, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Varthemia sericea can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
